source_filing: Apple Inc. FY2025 Form 10-K (filed 2025-11, fiscal year ended September 27, 2025)
original_text: During 2025, the Company s net sales through its direct and indirect distribution channels accounted for 40% and 60%, respectively, of total net sales.
modified_text: During fiscal 2024, Apple's net sales through its direct and indirect distribution channels accounted for 40% and 60%, respectively, of total net sales.
claim: In fiscal 2024, Apple's direct distribution channels generated 40% of total net sales and indirect channels 60%.
citation_as_written: Apple Inc. FY2024 Form 10-K, Business (Distribution), fiscal year ended September 28, 2024
notes: The 40%/60% split is faithful to the passage, but the source states this for 'During 2025' (FY2025), not FY2024. The claim and citation_as_written wrongly attribute it to fiscal 2024, a year the source contradicts; source_url remains the real FY2025 filing.
